ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter a custom model ID from Hugging Face. The repo must include ONNX weights — most sentence-transformer repos only ship PyTorch / safetensors. Try the `onnx-community/...` mirror if a model fails to load.
ast.target: 输入来自 Hugging Face 的自定义模型 ID。仓库必须包含 ONNX 权重——大多数 sentence-transformer 仓库仅提供 PyTorch / safetensors 格式。如果模型加载失败，请尝试 `onnx-community/...` 镜像。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, WebGPU will be used for model inference. Disable if you experience issues with GPU acceleration.
ast.target: 如果启用，将使用 WebGPU 进行模型推理。如果遇到 GPU 加速问题，请禁用此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your Google AI Studio API key (get it from aistudio.google.com)
ast.target: 您的 Google AI Studio API 密钥（从 aistudio.google.com 获取）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 选择一个嵌入模型

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 输入 Gemini 模型 ID

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Test the connection to the Gemini API
ast.target: 测试与 Gemini API 的连接

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: URL of your Ollama server (default: http://localhost:11434)
ast.target: 您的 Ollama 服务器 URL（默认：http://localhost:11434）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select an Ollama model for embeddings
ast.target: 选择一个用于嵌入的 Ollama 模型

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Test the connection to Ollama server and selected model
ast.target: 测试与 Ollama 服务器及所选模型的连接

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: URL of your OpenAI-compatible server (default: https://api.openai.com/v1)
ast.target: 您的 OpenAI 兼容服务器 URL（默认：https://api.openai.com/v1）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your OpenAI API key (required for OpenAI, optional for local servers)
ast.target: 您的 OpenAI API 密钥（OpenAI 必需，本地服务器可选）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the model ID for your OpenAI-compatible server
ast.target: 输入您的 OpenAI 兼容服务器的模型 ID

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum tokens per chunk for this model
ast.target: 此模型每个分块的最大 token 数

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Test the connection to the server and model
ast.target: 测试与服务器及模型的连接

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter price to calculate estimated costs
ast.target: 输入价格以计算预估成本

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 清除所有 token 使用历史记录

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose between built-in models, Ollama, OpenAI API, or Google Gemini
ast.target: 在内置模型、Ollama、OpenAI API 或 Google Gemini 之间选择

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Wait time (seconds) after file changes before indexing. Higher values reduce API costs for paid providers.
ast.target: 文件更改后开始索引前的等待时间（秒）。较高的值可降低付费提供商的 API 成本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rebuild the similarity index for all notes
ast.target: 为所有笔记重建相似性索引

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the frontmatter of each note will be included in the similarity index and search.
ast.target: 如果启用，每篇笔记的 frontmatter 将被包含在相似性索引和搜索中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Synchronize the index with current exclusion patterns without full reindexing
ast.target: 将索引与当前排除模式同步，无需完全重建索引

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter glob patterns to exclude folders/files from indexing (one per line). Note: Only applies to newly modified notes. Use Reindex to apply to all notes.
ast.target: 输入 glob 模式以从索引中排除文件夹/文件（每行一个）。注意：仅适用于新修改的笔记。使用“重建索引”可应用于所有笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter regular expressions to exclude content from indexing (one per line). Note: Only applies to newly modified notes. Use Reindex to apply to all notes.
ast.target: 输入正则表达式以从索引中排除内容（每行一个）。注意：仅适用于新修改的笔记。使用“重建索引”可应用于所有笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Test your regular expressions against sample text
ast.target: 针对示例文本测试您的正则表达式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display similar notes section at the bottom of each note
ast.target: 在每篇笔记底部显示相似笔记部分

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how note names are displayed in the results
ast.target: 选择结果中笔记名称的显示方式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the source chunk (the part of your current note used for similarity search) will be shown in the results
ast.target: 如果启用，源分块（用于相似性搜索的当前笔记部分）将显示在结果中

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of similar notes to display in the sidebar (1-50)
ast.target: 侧边栏中显示的最大相似笔记数（1-50）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of similar notes to display at the bottom of notes (1-20)
ast.target: 笔记底部显示的最大相似笔记数（1-20）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hide results below this cosine similarity (0.00 – 1.00). 0 keeps every result.
ast.target: 隐藏低于此余弦相似度的结果（0.00 – 1.00）。0 表示保留所有结果。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the logging level for debugging purposes
ast.target: 设置用于调试的日志级别

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Copy your environment and settings info to clipboard for bug reports
ast.target: 将您的环境和设置信息复制到剪贴板，用于错误报告

ast.name: warn

ast.target: Ollama API 返回了无效的模型数据

ast.name: warn
ast.source: restore() is deprecated. Data is loaded automatically in init().
ast.target: restore() 已弃用。数据在 init() 中自动加载。

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [警告]：LangSmith 收到了无法序列化的值。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [WARNING]: LangSmith received circular JSON. This will decrease tracer performance.
ast.target: [警告]：LangSmith 收到了循环 JSON。这将降低追踪器性能。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [WARNING]: LangSmith failed to fetch info on supported operations. Falling back to batch operations and default limits.
ast.target: [警告]：LangSmith 无法获取支持的操作信息。将回退到批量操作和默认限制。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [WARNING]: When tracing in manual flush mode, you must call `await client.flush()` manually to submit trace batches.
ast.target: [警告]：在手动刷新模式下进行追踪时，您必须手动调用 `await client.flush()` 来提交追踪批次。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: OpenAI may not support records in schemas! Try an array of key-value pairs instead.
ast.target: 警告：OpenAI 可能不支持模式中的记录！请尝试使用键值对数组。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: OpenAI may not support schemas with unions as roots! Try wrapping it in an object property.
ast.target: 警告：OpenAI 可能不支持以联合类型为根的模式！请尝试将其包装在对象属性中。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Provided runId will be used only for the first element of the batch.
ast.target: 提供的 runId 将仅用于批次的第一个元素。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在重新索引所有笔记...

ast.target: 未找到此模型的 ONNX 权重。请尝试 Hugging Face 上的 `onnx-community/...` 版本，或在设置中切换到其他提供商。
